name: link-transformer
title: Link Transformer
description: Link Transformer lets you save, search, and transform links using your own javascript custom actions.
author: dangkhoipro

commands.name: list-links
commands.title: List Links
commands.description: Search your saved links by alias, then apply custom actions to transform the URL and open the result in your browser.

commands.name: list-actions
commands.title: List Actions
commands.description: Search and manage your custom link transformation actions.

commands.name: add-link
commands.title: Add Link
commands.description: Add a new link with aliases for quick access.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
